horseshoe_default.description: WFS Horseshoe default — all Horseshoe sheds use the same email and subject EXCEPT American Airlines.
horseshoe_default.hmrc_registration: GBAULHRLHRWXS — Worldwide Flight Services Limited, Building 549/550/551, Shoreham Road East

horseshoe_aa_exception.description: AA moved 552 → 550B physically, but CEVA never updated AA's prealert subject/email. The ONLY exception to the Horseshoe default rule.
horseshoe_aa_exception.hmrc_registration: GBAULHRLHRAAS was REMOVED from HMRC on 12 Nov 2024. Operationally still in active use by CEVA and other forwarders — confirmed 21 Apr 2026.

grey_area_gf_ul_vn_2c_sv.note: CEVA PDF originally routed GF/UL/VN/2C/SV to LHRAAS + 552. Current operational rule treats AA as the SOLE exception. If one of these airlines appears on a slip for 552, use default (LHRWXS + 549 email) unless slip explicitly states otherwise.

125.note: Per Soap 20 Apr 2026 + Simon (veteran planner) + Paul Weller (WFS DM): BARC handles BA 125 prefixes in addition to MK (Air Mauritius). Confirm subject code when on-site at WFS.

074.note: Route depends on slip — NOT SLS by default

hmrc.address: Building 553, Shoreham Road East, Heathrow Airport, Hounslow, Middlesex. TW6 3RG

sheds.routing_notes: Located at X2, Hatton Cross Centre

hmrc.note: Not in current ITSF/ETSF lists. May be registered under a related entity.

sheds.routing_notes: ASC (Radius Park location) — Swissport operator

hmrc.note: Radius Park has multiple ETSF entries. XCY specifically not found.

sheds.routing_notes: Renamed from ASC when Swissport formally registered the location with HMRC on 20 Jan 2026. Building 582 is also home to ASC's own ITSF registration (JZS suffix) — shared-building location.

hmrc.address: 582 Sandringham Road, London Heathrow Airport, Hounslow, Middlesex, United Kingdom. TW6 3SN

sheds.handler_legal_name: Aviation Servicing Company Limited T/A ASC Cargo Handling
sheds.routing_notes: Shares Building 582 with Swissport (ZCS). ASC Cargo Handling is the long-standing occupant; Swissport's ZCS registration was added Jan 2026. Subject code and prealert email not currently in our operational data — verify if ASC is still routed to separately.

hmrc.legal_name: Aviation Servicing Company Limited T/A ASC Cargo Handling
hmrc.address: Building 582, Sandringham Road, Heathrow Airport, Hounslow, Middlesex. TW6 3SN

sheds.routing_notes: Subject code TBC. HMRC-registered as ITSF.

hmrc.address: 580/581 Sandringham Road, London Heathrow Airport. TW6 3SN

hmrc.note: Dnata DC1 not found under NAS suffix in current HMRC data. Dnata has multiple HMRC registrations for different units; DC1 may be registered under a different suffix we haven't yet mapped.

sheds.routing_notes: Ethiopian (ET, prefix 071) confirmed here per Soap's 20 Apr 2026 override
Virgin Atlantic main handler at LHR
Dedicated Cathay Pacific facility

hmrc.address: Unit 521a, Stirling Road, London Heathrow Airport, Middlesex. TW6 3JJ

sheds.routing_notes: BA MAIN general cargo. HMRC registers 'British Airways PLC' (not IAG Cargo) as the named entity — confirms Soap's observation. Differentiate from BAC_EXPRESS via slip 'MAIN' marker. If ambiguous, fall back to IAG track-trace.

hmrc.address: Ascentis, Building 1233, Sealand Road, Heathrow Airport, Hounslow, Middlesex. TW6 2JS

sheds.routing_notes: BA EXPRESS / Premia — differentiate from BAC_MAIN via slip 'EXPRESS' or 'Premia' marker. Shares subject code LHRBAC with Ascentis — EMAIL is the differentiator. HMRC may register this as BAS (GBAULHRLHRBAS, same address) — SOAP TO VERIFY on shift.

hmrc.address: Ascentis, Building 1233, Sealand Road, Heathrow Airport, Hounslow, Middlesex. TW6 2JS
hmrc.note: BA has TWO codes: BAC and BAS, both at same address. Soap to confirm which is Premia vs Ascentis.

sheds.handler_legal_name: Dunwoody Airline Services Limited T/A Worldwide Flight Services
sheds.routing_notes: Third BA handler at Heathrow (per Soap 20 Apr 2026 + Simon + Paul Weller WFS DM interview). BARC = BA Regional Cargo. Soap's new workplace from 7 May 2026. Subject code TBC — verify on first shift. Likely LHRDAX or LHRBBS based on email pattern.

hmrc.legal_name: Dunwoody Airline Services Limited T/A Worldwide Flight Services
hmrc.address: Building 875, Scylla Road, Hounslow, Middlesex. TW6 3YH

sheds.routing_notes: HMRC-registered at Building 557 (MW1 building name matches Soap's email convention). Shared subject LHRCIS with AMI — EMAIL is the differentiator.

hmrc.address: MW1 Building 557, Shoreham Road West, London Heathrow Airport, Hounslow, Middlesex. TW6 3RJ

sheds.routing_notes: Registered as ETSF at Polar Park (WRX suffix) — operationally shares CIS code with Menzies Shoreham Rd. Email is the differentiator.

hmrc.address: Unit 2B, Polar Park, Bath Road, Heathrow. UB7 0DG
hmrc.note: Registered under WRX suffix for legal purposes; CIS is the operational shared-code with Menzies Shoreham Rd.

sheds.routing_notes: HMRC operator is 'Heathrow Cargo Handling Limited' (HCH), not Swissport GB directly. Operationally Swissport staff — likely HCH is a Swissport subsidiary/trading name. Swissport reshuffles airline allocations periodically — ALWAYS trust slip header.

hmrc.address: Building 558, Shoreham Road West, London Heathrow Airport, Hounslow, Middlesex. TW6 3RN

sheds.routing_notes: KL is NOT routed here by default (corrected 20 Apr 2026)

hmrc.address: Building 521B, Stansted Road, London Heathrow Airport, Hounslow, Middlesex. TW6 3LW

sheds.routing_notes: HMRC operator is 'Heathrow Cargo Handling Limited' (HCH), not Swissport GB. Operationally Swissport staff. Registered as ETSF, not ITSF. KLM (074) may route here OR to Swissport 558 (AFS) — trust slip header.

hmrc.address: HCH House, Horton Road, Colnbrook, Slough. SL3 0AT

airlines.name: All Horseshoe airlines EXCEPT American Airlines

sheds.routing_notes: Horseshoe default. Covers sheds 549, 550A, 550B, 551, 552. AA (prefix 001) is the SOLE exception — see AAS entry.

hmrc.address: Building 549/550/551, Shoreham Road East, London Heathrow Airport, Hounslow, Middlesex. TW6 3UA

sheds.routing_notes: AA moved 552 → 550B physically. CEVA never updated AA's prealert subject/email. The ONLY exception to Horseshoe default. The 552 email is correct DESPITE physical location being 550B.

hmrc.note: GBAULHRLHRAAS was REMOVED from HMRC's ITSF list on 12 Nov 2024. The code remains in active operational use at CEVA and industry-wide for AA prealerts. This is the clearest example of 'operational truth vs regulated truth' divergence.

sheds.routing_notes: SHARES email address (bbs.spxra.alerts@wfs.aero) with DAX (Building 875 BARC). May be a legacy code superseded by DAX, OR a separate building still in use. VERIFY when at WFS.

hmrc.note: Not in current HMRC list. DAX (Dunwoody 875) is the current HMRC-registered BARC handler.

other_airports.routing_notes: NOT at Heathrow — Glasgow Prestwick Airport

questions_for_soap_on_shift: BA has TWO HMRC codes at same address: BAC and BAS. Which is Ascentis (Main)? Which is Premia (Express)?
XBQ vs DAX — is XBQ still actively used, or has DAX (Bldg 875, Dunwoody) replaced it for BARC prealerts?
BARC subject code for BA 125 prefix slips — what's used operationally? (Expecting LHRDAX or LHRBBS)
ASC (Aviation Servicing Company at Bldg 582, JZS code) — is ASC still routed to separately, or has Swissport (ZCS) absorbed all operations there?
CFL — any subject code used operationally? Email is spx@cfl.aero.
Swissport vs Heathrow Cargo Handling — does HCH brand show up anywhere operationally, or is it purely the legal ITSF holder while Swissport is what everyone knows it as?
